basic_details.job_title: Hindustan Copper Junior Manager Recruitment 2025 – Apply Online for 64 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Copper (Hindustan Copper) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 64 Junior Manager Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official Hindustan Copper website. The last date to submit the application form is 17-12-2025. In this article, you’ll find the Hindustan Copper Junior Manager Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

application_fee.details: General/OBC Candidates: Rs. 500/- SC/ST/PwD/Women: Exempted Payment Mode: Online (Payment Gateway/NEFT)

qualification.details: Candidates must possess Diploma with 5 Years Experience OR Degree with 2 Years Experience (Varies by Discipline) from a recognized university/board to apply for HCL Junior Manager (E0 Grade) positions. | The age limit for HCL Junior Manager (E0 Grade) Recruitment 2025 is: | Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC(NCL): 3 years, PWD: 10-15 years, Ex-Servicemen: As per Govt Age calculation date: 01/11/2025 | Candidates must be Indian citizens or as specified in the official notification.

selection_process: Candidates will be selected based on the following process:
Written Examination (Online CBT) Document Verification Medical Examination
Note: Check the official notification for the exact selection procedure.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply online for HCL Junior Manager (E0 Grade) 2025 by following these steps:
Find the "Junior Manager (E0 Grade) Recruitment 2025" notification link
